---
title: "Notes"
listing:
  contents: published/*.qmd
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, date, categories]
---

This site publishes a curated set of notes. Use the category filters to find notes by topic.

Additional notes generated from a separate subproject are available here:
[Converting lazy data frames into Parquet files (Python version)](db2pq_test/ibis_to_pq.html).
[Benchmarking local PostgreSQL-to-Parquet export paths](db2pq_test/local_engine_benchmark.html).
